# Hidden Chest Studio

> Malaysian game development studio based in Kuala Lumpur, founded in 2020. Builds branded minigames, gamified brand activations, and custom games/apps for enterprise clients, alongside its own flagship IP. Legal entity: Hidden Chest Studio Sdn. Bhd. (Malaysia company no. 202001029555 / 1385875-P).

Hidden Chest Studio has delivered interactive projects for AirAsia and Khazanah Nasional, and partners with MDEC. Its flagship title, Midwest 90: Rapid City, is a tycoon survival simulator in development for Steam. Every project is led directly by one of the studio's three co-founders — there is no outsourcing layer between the client and the build.

## Services
- [Branded Minigame Development](https://www.hiddenchest.studio/services/branded-minigames.html): Custom minigames built for brand campaigns and marketing activations.
- [Gamification Agency](https://www.hiddenchest.studio/services/gamification.html): Gamified apps, enterprise engagement systems, and rewards/loyalty mechanics.
- [Game Development Studio](https://www.hiddenchest.studio/services/game-development.html): Full game development and dev-support services across PC, mobile, and web.

## Flagship IP
- [Midwest 90: Rapid City (Steam)](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1818480/Midwest_90_Rapid_City/): Tycoon survival simulator set in a 1990s American Midwest town.

## Blog
- [How Branded Minigames Drive Engagement for Modern Brands](https://www.hiddenchest.studio/blog/branded-minigames-for-marketing.html)
- [What Is Gamification for Brand Activation?](https://www.hiddenchest.studio/blog/what-is-gamification-brand-activation.html)
